name: Hammelsuppe (Mutton Soup)
recipeInstructions:
Serves Four.
Potato Dumplings (Kartoffel Kloessel), Parsley, Nutmeg
Cut well washed pieces of mutton into bite-sized pieces. Place in water (1 1/2 liters) with salt and bring to a boil. Add the celery root and carrots, finely chopped onion, and then put in cubed potato. Cook for 1 1/2 hours. If the potatoes do not fall apart, run them through a sieve. One half hour before the soup is finished, sprinkle in the farina. When fully cooked, add walnut-sized pieces of potato dumpling into the soup. After ten minutes stir in chopped parsley, nutmeg, and add in the egg yolk that was beaten into the cream or milk.
